name: Chef's Tuna Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the tuna.
2. Flake the tuna into bite-sized pieces.
3. Rub a salad bowl with garlic.
4. Place lettuce in the bowl and break it into bite-size pieces.
5. Add flaked tuna, carrot strips, green pepper, radishes, tomato wedges, cheese strips, salt, and pepper to the bowl.
6. Pour French dressing over all and toss lightly.
Makes 4 servings.
